subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses in truth, that thereby He might guide such servants as waft the fragrances of faithfulness. Verily, He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لیهدی بها عباد الذین فاحت منهم نفحات الوفاء انه
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @proclamation to kings; rulers; prominent individuals, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
